allow: Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('local.db'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(tables.map\(t => t.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/oppo-tracker.db'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\); console.log\(tables.map\(t => t.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; const chart = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => /chart|recharts|victory|d3|visx|nivo|apex|plot|graph/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\('Chart libs:', chart\); console.log\('All UI deps:', Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => /ui|radix|base|headless|framer|motion/i.test\(k\)\)\)")
